data.title: Authenticom Group acquires iSKY's Automotive Experience Division from ibex, including RefleCX™ platform on Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: In La Crosse, Wisconsin on October 16, 2025, the Authenticom Group of Companies revealed the purchase of the majority of assets from ibex's iSKY Automotive Experience Division, which encompasses the highly-regarded RefleCX™ platform. This acquisition represents a key advancement in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Amazon.com to webcast Q3 2025 financial results conference call on Oct 30, 2025, 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: E-commerce giant Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) is set to host a conference call regarding its third quarter financial performance for 2025. The call is scheduled for Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET. The company will live-stream the event, and the audio and presentation materials will be accessible on their Investor Relations website, www.amazon.com/ir, for a minimum of three months post the call.

data.title: The Trade Desk (TTD) to reveal Q3 2025 financials on Nov 6 after market close. Conference call at 2:00 PM PT.
data.description: In Los Angeles, The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD), a global advertising technology platform provider, will be reporting its third-quarter financial results for the period ending September 30, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, November 6, 2025, after the market closes. To discuss the financial results, a webcast and conference call will be hosted by The Trade Desk at 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time on the same day. Interested parties can join the event at 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time on November 6, 2025.

data.title: Doximity to report Q2 results on Nov 6, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 2pm PT (5pm ET) to discuss financials.
data.description: In San Francisco, Doximity, Inc. (NYSE:DOCS), the top digital platform for U.S. medical professionals, stated that it will disclose financial outcomes for the fiscal second quarter ending on September 30, 2025, following the market's closure on November 6, 2025. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) to review these results. For individuals interested in joining the live audio webcast, access the Company’s Investor Relations page at https://investors.doximity.com/

data.title: CSX Corp. Q3 2025: Operating income $1.09B, net earnings $694M ($0.37/share). Adjusted figures: income $1.25B, earnings $818M ($0.44/share).
data.description: Jacksonville, Florida - On October 16, 2025, CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) revealed its third quarter financial results, showing an operating income of $1.09 billion and net earnings of $694 million, equivalent to $0.37 per share. Factoring out a non-cash goodwill impairment of $164 million from this quarter's results, the adjusted operating income stood at $1.25 billion with adjusted net earnings of $818 million, or $0.44 per share. Contrasted with the third quarter of 2024, where the company posted an operating income of $1.35 billion and net earnings of $894 million, translating to $0.46 per share.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Group announced 3Q2025 results: $0.59 diluted EPS, $1,655M net revenues this quarter.
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR), a global electronic broker based in Greenwich, Connecticut, has released its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. In the current quarter, diluted earnings per share were reported at $0.59, with adjusted earnings at $0.57. This marks an increase from the year-ago quarter, where reported diluted earnings per share stood at $0.42, with adjusted earnings at $0.40. Net revenues for the current quarter were reported at $1,655 million, and $1,610 million when adjusted. These numbers point to a growth in both earnings and revenues compared to the same period last year.

data.title: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. will release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 3, 2025 via conference call.
data.description: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTN and FSE: QH9) based in Huntsville, Alabama, will report its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Monday, November 3, 2025. The information will be available at https://investors.adtran.com/. A conference call to discuss the results will be held on Tuesday, November 4, 2025. The ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. Earnings Call is scheduled for 9:30 a.m. Central Time (4:30 p.m. CET).

data.title: Blend Labs, Inc. (NYSE: BLND) to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, with a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT/4:30 p.m. ET.
data.description: Blend Labs, Inc. will announce its third-quarter 2025 financial results on November 6, 2025, after the market closes. The company, listed on NYSE as BLND, is a leading digital origination platform. The earnings release will be followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. Those interested can access the live call through a link on the Company’s Investor Relations website at investor.blend.com.

data.title: First affordable housing in Lahaina since 2023 wildfires opens today, introducing 200 homes for families in Maui.
data.description: A new permanent multifamily affordable housing development in Maui has been announced, marking the first of its kind since the 2023 wildfires. This development will introduce 200 homes for families in the area, addressing the pressing need for affordable housing options.

data.title: Minnesota Dental Association advises avoiding sour candies this Halloween to protect teeth from harm.
data.description: With Halloween approaching, the Minnesota Dental Association (MDA) on October 16, 2025, advised treat-givers to opt for tooth-friendly options and avoid sour candies. Despite their popularity, these seemingly harmless sour treats contain high levels of acid...

data.title: Pilot Pen launches collaboration with SmileyWorld® for new G2 Gel Pen Collection, aiming to spark positivity in writing.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on October 16, 2025, a collaboration was announced between America's top gel pen, Pilot Pen, and a renowned brand known for promoting positivity and emotional expression. The result? The Pilot Pen G2 | SmileyWorld® Collection, a limited edition release. This partnership is set to bring smiles to faces globally, uniting Pilot Corporation of America with a brand dedicated to spreading happiness.
